# Veritasium — human captions, good quality
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HeQX2HjkcNo
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MBRqu0YOH14

# Kurzgesagt — usually auto-generated
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LnFinNFsEAQ

# 3Blue1Brown — reliable human captions
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aircAruvnKk

# TED Talk — almost always human captions
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UyyjU8fzEYU
